message:
feat(session+rpc): add ExportSnapshot for non-blocking HTML export and refactor fork to snapshot-first pattern

session.rs: Extracts render_session_html() as a shared free function,
replacing the inline HTML rendering in Session::to_html() with a
delegation call. Adds ExportSnapshot struct capturing only header,
entries, and path — the minimal subset needed for HTML rendering —
avoiding a full Session::clone() which includes caches, autosave queues,
and persistence state. Session::export_snapshot() creates this lightweight
snapshot. Also fixes Self:: usage in ensure_full_v2_hydration_before_save.

rpc.rs: Replaces the export_html path's full Session clone with
export_snapshot(), then renders HTML outside the session lock via the new
export_html_snapshot() function. Refactors the fork operation into a
two-phase snapshot-first pattern: Phase 1 briefly locks to compute
ForkPlan and extract metadata, then Phase 2 builds and saves the forked
session without holding the parent session lock, reducing lock contention
during concurrent operations. Removes unused HashSet import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
